en: "And if you faithfully obey the voice of the LORD your God, being careful to do all his commandments that I command you today, the LORD your God will set you high above all the nations of the earth.
zh: “如果你實在聽從耶和華你的 神的話，謹守遵行他的一切誡命，就是我今日吩咐你的，耶和華你的 神必使你超過地上所有的民族。

en: And all these blessings shall come upon you and overtake you, if you obey the voice of the LORD your God.
zh: 如果你聽從耶和華你的 神的話，以下這一切福氣必臨到你身上，必把你追上。

en: Blessed shall you be in the city, and blessed shall you be in the field.
zh: 你在城裡必蒙福，在田間也必蒙福。

en: Blessed shall be the fruit of your womb and the fruit of your ground and the fruit of your cattle, the increase of your herds and the young of your flock.
zh: 你身所生的、土地所出的、牲畜所出的、牛生殖的和羊所產的，都必蒙福。

en: Blessed shall be your basket and your kneading bowl.
zh: 你的籃子和你的摶麵盆，都必蒙福。

en: Blessed shall you be when you come in, and blessed shall you be when you go out.
zh: 你出必蒙福，你入也必蒙福。

en: "The LORD will cause your enemies who rise against you to be defeated before you. They shall come out against you one way and flee before you seven ways.
zh: “那起來攻擊你的仇敵，耶和華必使他們在你面前被擊敗；他們從一條路出來攻擊你，必在你面前從七條路逃跑。

en: The LORD will command the blessing on you in your barns and in all that you undertake. And he will bless you in the land that the LORD your God is giving you.
zh: 在你的倉房裡和你手所辦的一切事上，耶和華必吩咐福氣臨到你；在耶和華你的 神賜給你的地上，他必賜福給你。

en: The LORD will establish you as a people holy to himself, as he has sworn to you, if you keep the commandments of the LORD your God and walk in his ways.
zh: 如果你謹守耶和華你的 神的誡命，遵守他的道路，耶和華就必照著他向你起過的誓，立你作他自己的聖民。

en: And all the peoples of the earth shall see that you are called by the name of the LORD, and they shall be afraid of you.
zh: 地上萬民見你被稱為耶和華名下的人，就必懼怕你。

en: And the LORD will make you abound in prosperity, in the fruit of your womb and in the fruit of your livestock and in the fruit of your ground, within the land that the LORD swore to your fathers to give you.
zh: 在耶和華向你列祖起誓應許要賜給你的土地上，他必使你身上所生的、牲畜所產的、土地所出的，都豐富有餘。

en: The LORD will open to you his good treasury, the heavens, to give the rain to your land in its season and to bless all the work of your hands. And you shall lend to many nations, but you shall not borrow.
zh: 耶和華必為你打開他天上的寶庫，按時降雨在你的地上，在你手裡所作的一切事上賜福給你；你要借貸給許多國的民，卻不會向人借貸。

en: And the LORD will make you the head and not the tail, and you shall only go up and not down, if you obey the commandments of the LORD your God, which I command you today, being careful to do them,
zh: 耶和華必使你作頭不作尾，居上不居下，只要你聽從耶和華你的 神的誡命，就是我今日吩咐你的，謹守遵行；

en: and if you do not turn aside from any of the words that I command you today, to the right hand or to the left, to go after other gods to serve them.
zh: 不可偏離我今日吩咐你的一切話，不偏左也不偏右，以致去隨從和事奉別的神。

en: "But if you will not obey the voice of the LORD your God or be careful to do all his commandments and his statutes that I command you today, then all these curses shall come upon you and overtake you.
zh: “但是，如果你不聽從耶和華你 神的話，不謹守遵行我今日吩咐你的一切誡命和律例，以下這一切咒詛就必臨到你身上，把你趕上。

en: Cursed shall you be in the city, and cursed shall you be in the field.
zh: 你在城裡必受咒詛，在田間也必受咒詛。

en: Cursed shall be your basket and your kneading bowl.
zh: 你的籃子和摶麵盆都必受咒詛。

en: Cursed shall be the fruit of your womb and the fruit of your ground, the increase of your herds and the young of your flock.
zh: 你身所生的、土地所出的、牛生殖的和羊所產的，都必受咒詛。

en: Cursed shall you be when you come in, and cursed shall you be when you go out.
zh: 你出必受咒詛，你入也必受咒詛。

en: "The LORD will send on you curses, confusion, and frustration in all that you undertake to do, until you are destroyed and perish quickly on account of the evil of your deeds, because you have forsaken me.
zh: “耶和華必在你手所作的一切事上，使咒詛、紛亂和責備臨到你身上，直到你被消滅，速速地滅亡，因為你行惡，離棄了我的緣故。

en: The LORD will make the pestilence stick to you until he has consumed you off the land that you are entering to take possession of it.
zh: 耶和華必使瘟疫隨著你，直到他把你從你進去得為業的地上滅絕了。

en: The LORD will strike you with wasting disease and with fever, inflammation and fiery heat, and with drought and with blight and with mildew. They shall pursue you until you perish.
zh: 耶和華必用癆病、熱病、炎症、瘧疾、乾旱、旱風和霉爛打擊你；它們必追趕你，直到你滅亡。

en: And the heavens over your head shall be bronze, and the earth under you shall be iron.
zh: 你頭上的天必變成銅，你腳下的地必變成鐵。

en: The LORD will make the rain of your land powder. From heaven dust shall come down on you until you are destroyed.
zh: 耶和華必使你地上的雨水變為飛沙塵土，從天上下到你身上，直到你被消滅。

en: "The LORD will cause you to be defeated before your enemies. You shall go out one way against them and flee seven ways before them. And you shall be a horror to all the kingdoms of the earth.
zh: 耶和華必使你在仇敵面前被擊敗；你從一條路出去攻擊他們，必在他們面前從七條路逃跑；你必成為天下萬國驚駭的對象。

en: And your dead body shall be food for all birds of the air and for the beasts of the earth, and there shall be no one to frighten them away.
zh: 你的屍體必成為空中的飛鳥和地上的走獸的食物；必沒有人來把牠們嚇走。

en: The LORD will strike you with the boils of Egypt, and with tumors and scabs and itch, of which you cannot be healed.
zh: “耶和華必用埃及人的瘡、痔漏、牛皮癬、紅疹打擊你，這是你不能醫治的。

en: The LORD will strike you with madness and blindness and confusion of mind,
zh: 耶和華必用癲狂、眼瞎、心亂打擊你；

en: and you shall grope at noonday, as the blind grope in darkness, and you shall not prosper in your ways. And you shall be only oppressed and robbed continually, and there shall be no one to help you.
zh: 你必在中午的時候摸索，好像瞎子在黑暗中摸索一樣；你的道路必不亨通；你必日日受欺壓、被搶奪，沒有人拯救你。

en: You shall betroth a wife, but another man shall ravish her. You shall build a house, but you shall not dwell in it. You shall plant a vineyard, but you shall not enjoy its fruit.
zh: 你和女子訂了婚，別人必和她同寢；你建造房屋，必不得住在裡面；你栽種葡萄園，必不得享用它的果子。

en: Your ox shall be slaughtered before your eyes, but you shall not eat any of it. Your donkey shall be seized before your face, but shall not be restored to you. Your sheep shall be given to your enemies, but there shall be no one to help you.
zh: 你的牛在你眼前被宰了，你必不得吃牠的肉；你的驢從你面前被搶奪了，必不歸還給你；你的羊群交給了你的仇敵，必沒有人拯救。

en: Your sons and your daughters shall be given to another people, while your eyes look on and fail with longing for them all day long, but you shall be helpless.
zh: 你的兒女必被交給別國的民，你必親眼看見，日日為他們焦慮；你必無能為力。

en: A nation that you have not known shall eat up the fruit of your ground and of all your labors, and you shall be only oppressed and crushed continually,
zh: 你土地的出產和你勞碌得來的一切，都必被你不認識的民族吃盡；你必常常受壓迫和壓制；

en: so that you are driven mad by the sights that your eyes see.
zh: 你因親眼看見的，必要瘋狂。

en: The LORD will strike you on the knees and on the legs with grievous boils of which you cannot be healed, from the sole of your foot to the crown of your head.
zh: 耶和華必用毒瘡打擊你的雙膝和雙腿，由踵至頂，使你無法醫治。

en: "The LORD will bring you and your king whom you set over you to a nation that neither you nor your fathers have known. And there you shall serve other gods of wood and stone.
zh: 耶和華必把你和你所立統治你的君王，領到你和你的列祖都不認識的國那裡去；在那裡你必事奉別的神，就是木頭石頭所做的神。

en: And you shall become a horror, a proverb, and a byword among all the peoples where the LORD will lead you away.
zh: 在耶和華要領你去的各民族中，你必成為使人驚駭、使人嘲笑和諷刺的對象。

en: You shall carry much seed into the field and shall gather in little, for the locust shall consume it.
zh: “你帶到田間的種子雖然很多，但收進來的卻很少，因為蝗蟲把它吞吃了。

en: You shall plant vineyards and dress them, but you shall neither drink of the wine nor gather the grapes, for the worm shall eat them.
zh: 你栽種修理葡萄園，必不得收葡萄，也不得喝葡萄酒，因為蟲子把它吃盡了。

en: You shall have olive trees throughout all your territory, but you shall not anoint yourself with the oil, for your olives shall drop off.
zh: 你全境必有橄欖樹，卻沒有油抹身，因為你的橄欖還未成熟就脫落了。

en: You shall father sons and daughters, but they shall not be yours, for they shall go into captivity.
zh: 你必生兒養女，卻不是屬你的，因為他們都要被擄去。

en: The cricket shall possess all your trees and the fruit of your ground.
zh: 你所有的樹木和你土地的出產，都必被害蟲吃光。

en: The sojourner who is among you shall rise higher and higher above you, and you shall come down lower and lower.
zh: 住在你中間的寄居者必漸漸高升，比你高而又高；你必漸漸下降，低而又低。

en: He shall lend to you, and you shall not lend to him. He shall be the head, and you shall be the tail.
zh: 他要借給你，你卻不能借給他；他必作頭，你必作尾。

en: "All these curses shall come upon you and pursue you and overtake you till you are destroyed, because you did not obey the voice of the LORD your God, to keep his commandments and his statutes that he commanded you.
zh: 這一切咒詛必臨到你，必追趕你，必把你追上，直到你被消滅，因為你不聽從耶和華你的 神的話，沒有遵守他吩咐你的誡命和律例。

en: They shall be a sign and a wonder against you and your offspring forever.
zh: 這些咒詛必在你和你的後裔身上成為異蹟和奇事，直到永遠。

en: Because you did not serve the LORD your God with joyfulness and gladness of heart, because of the abundance of all things,
zh: 因為你在這樣富足的時候，沒有以歡樂和高興的心來事奉耶和華你的 神，

en: therefore you shall serve your enemies whom the LORD will send against you, in hunger and thirst, in nakedness, and lacking everything. And he will put a yoke of iron on your neck until he has destroyed you.
zh: 所以你必在飢餓、乾渴、赤身露體和缺乏之中，去事奉耶和華派來攻擊你的仇敵；他必把鐵軛放在你的頸項上，直到把你消滅。

en: The LORD will bring a nation against you from far away, from the end of the earth, swooping down like the eagle, a nation whose language you do not understand,
zh: “耶和華必從遠方，從地極把一國的民帶來，像鷹一般飛來攻擊你；這民的語言你不會聽；

en: a hard-faced nation who shall not respect the old or show mercy to the young.
zh: 這民臉無羞恥，不顧老年人的情面，也不恩待青年人。

en: It shall eat the offspring of your cattle and the fruit of your ground, until you are destroyed; it also shall not leave you grain, wine, or oil, the increase of your herds or the young of your flock, until they have caused you to perish.
zh: 他們必吞吃你牲畜所生的和你土地所產的，直到把你消滅；必不給你留下五穀、新酒和油、幼小的牛，以及肥嫩的羊，直到使你滅亡為止。

en: "They shall besiege you in all your towns, until your high and fortified walls, in which you trusted, come down throughout all your land. And they shall besiege you in all your towns throughout all your land, which the LORD your God has given you.
zh: 他們必把你圍困在你的各城裡，直到在你的全境內你所倚靠高大和堅固的城牆都被攻陷；他們必把你圍困在耶和華你的 神賜給你的全地的各城裡。

en: And you shall eat the fruit of your womb, the flesh of your sons and daughters, whom the LORD your God has given you, in the siege and in the distress with which your enemies shall distress you.
zh: 你在仇敵圍困和窘迫你的時候，要吃你身所生的，就是吃耶和華你的 神賜給你的兒女的肉。

en: The man who is the most tender and refined among you will begrudge food to his brother, to the wife he embraces, and to the last of the children whom he has left,
zh: 你們中間溫柔嫩弱的男人，必敵視自己的兄弟、懷中的妻子和餘剩的兒女；

en: so that he will not give to any of them any of the flesh of his children whom he is eating, because he has nothing else left, in the siege and in the distress with which your enemy shall distress you in all your towns.
zh: 甚至在你的仇敵圍困和窘迫你在各城裡的時候，他要吃自己兒女的肉，卻不肯分給他們任何人，因為他沒有甚麼剩下的。

en: The most tender and refined woman among you, who would not venture to set the sole of her foot on the ground because she is so delicate and tender, will begrudge to the husband she embraces, to her son and to her daughter,
zh: 你們中間溫柔嬌嫩的婦人，素來因為溫柔嬌嫩不肯把腳掌踏在地上，現在必敵視自己懷中的丈夫和自己的兒女。

en: her afterbirth that comes out from between her feet and her children whom she bears, because lacking everything she will eat them secretly, in the siege and in the distress with which your enemy shall distress you in your towns.
zh: 她暗中把自己兩腿之間出來的胞衣，和自己生的兒女吃掉，因為在你的仇敵圍困和窘迫你在各城裡的時候，她甚麼都沒有了。

en: "If you are not careful to do all the words of this law that are written in this book, that you may fear this glorious and awesome name, the LORD your God,
zh: “如果你不謹守遵行寫在這書上的這律法的一切話，不敬畏這榮耀和可畏的名，就是耶和華你的 神，

en: then the LORD will bring on you and your offspring extraordinary afflictions, afflictions severe and lasting, and sicknesses grievous and lasting.
zh: 耶和華就必使你和你的後裔遭受奇災，就是大而長久的災，毒而長久的病。

en: And he will bring upon you again all the diseases of Egypt, of which you were afraid, and they shall cling to you.
zh: 他必使你懼怕的埃及人的各種疾病都臨到你身上，緊緊地纏著你。

en: Every sickness also and every affliction that is not recorded in the book of this law, the LORD will bring upon you, until you are destroyed.
zh: 又把這律法書上沒有記載的各樣災病，都降在你身上，直到你被消滅。

en: Whereas you were as numerous as the stars of heaven, you shall be left few in number, because you did not obey the voice of the LORD your God.
zh: 你們以前雖然像天上的星那麼多，現在剩下的人數卻寥寥可數，因為你不聽從耶和華你的 神的話。

en: And as the LORD took delight in doing you good and multiplying you, so the LORD will take delight in bringing ruin upon you and destroying you. And you shall be plucked off the land that you are entering to take possession of it.
zh: 先前耶和華怎樣喜歡使你們得好處，使你們人數眾多，將來也必怎樣喜歡把你們滅亡，把你們消滅；你們必從要進去得為業的地上被拔除。

en: "And the LORD will scatter you among all peoples, from one end of the earth to the other, and there you shall serve other gods of wood and stone, which neither you nor your fathers have known.
zh: 耶和華必使你分散在萬民中，從地的這邊到地的那邊；在那裡你要事奉你和你的列祖不認識的別的神，就是木頭和石頭做的神。

en: And among these nations you shall find no respite, and there shall be no resting place for the sole of your foot, but the LORD will give you there a trembling heart and failing eyes and a languishing soul.
zh: 在那些國中，你必不得安息，也沒有腳掌歇息的地方；耶和華卻必使你在那裡心中發顫，眼目憔悴，精神頹廢。

en: Your life shall hang in doubt before you. Night and day you shall be in dread and have no assurance of your life.
zh: 你未來的生命必懸而不定；你必晝夜恐懼，生命難保。

en: In the morning you shall say, 'If only it were evening!' and at evening you shall say, 'If only it were morning!' because of the dread that your heart shall feel, and the sights that your eyes shall see.
zh: 因你心裡的懼怕驚恐和你眼中看見的景象，早晨你必說：‘但願現在是晚上！’晚上你必說：‘但願現在是早晨！’

en: And the LORD will bring you back in ships to Egypt, a journey that I promised that you should never make again; and there you shall offer yourselves for sale to your enemies as male and female slaves, but there will be no buyer."
zh: 耶和華必用船把你送回埃及去，走我曾經告訴你，你不得再見的那條路；在那裡你們必賣身給你的仇敵作奴僕和作婢女，卻沒有人買。”
